acceptance_criteria: four deterministic strategies receive one decision per materialized fixture
endpoint calculations are limited to deterministic strategies
no provider calls, spend, row execution, benchmark, model, or SOTA claim occurs
falsifiers: any deterministic strategy decision is missing
LLM judge executes in this gate
labels are used to create strategy decisions
provider calls, spend, row execution, or unsupported benchmark/model/SOTA claims occur
stated_goal: Execute zero-provider deterministic verification strategies on iter92 materialized fixtures and score partial endpoints without provider calls or SOTA claims.
